description_long: This is a three-seater couch with a soft, plush appearance and a slightly rounded silhouette. The upholstery is a light, off-white fabric with a subtle, mottled floral or speckled pattern in pastel tones, giving it a gentle, homey look. The seat and back cushions are thick and appear to be integrated or semi-attached, providing ample comfort. The armrests are rounded and padded, matching the overall softness of the design. The base of the couch is skirted, concealing the legs and adding to the traditional aesthetic. There are no visible accent pillows or decorative elements beyond the patterned fabric.
description: A plush, three-seater couch with light, patterned upholstery, rounded armrests, and a skirted base for a traditional look.
description_view_0: Front-left view showing three thick seat cushions, three back cushions, and rounded armrests with a skirted base.
description_view_1: Front-right view highlighting the same three-cushion arrangement and the soft, padded armrests.
description_view_2: Rear-left view displaying the continuous, patterned back and the skirted base, with no visible legs.
description_view_3: Rear-right view showing the full backrest and skirted base, emphasizing the couch's solid, upholstered rear.
attribute_cushion_arrangement: Three seat cushions and three back cushions, all thick and semi-attached, with no visible accent or throw pillows.
attribute_upholstery_pattern: Light-colored fabric with a subtle, mottled floral or speckled pattern in pastel tones; not tufted or quilted.
attribute_leg_style: Legs are fully hidden by a skirted base; no exposed legs or visible design features.
attribute_armrest_design: Armrests are rounded, padded, and medium height, fully upholstered in the same patterned fabric as the rest of the couch.
attribute_backrest_type: Backrest is high, divided into three cushioned sections, and appears semi-attached with a continuous, plush look.
